LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR BRIGITIA NEWT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO WITHHOLD $175.00 PER PAYPERIOD TOWARD PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT AND RELEASE THE BALANCE TO THE DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976. (302)

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Howard Olsen, Esq., 415.931.4207, for defendant/judgment debtor Brigitia Newt (who is also present in court); No other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court vacated its tentative rulin. Defendant/judgment debtor Brigitia Newt's claim of exemption is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to withhold $175.00 per payperiod toward payment of the judgment and release the balance to the debtor. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK, N.A.'s Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption - Transferred to the law and motion calendar to be heard at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 on the same date. Judge: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/JPT)
